title: Send David package — late-July 2022 logistics + a fixed-fee electricity question
html:
Send David package — late-July 2022 logistics + a fixed-fee electricity question

Source: 2022-07-21 Apple Note. Title = a single todo at the top of a 28-line scratch list. Mid-summer 2022, between OSU spring and fall, mid-Vietnam trip planning window.

TL;DR

  • The titular task: "-send David package" — left undescribed. David is a recurring entity in the vault, so this is a relational logistics note, not a one-off acquaintance.
  • Coursework string: CS161B homework, email Noah Dear about midterm/final, calculus midterm prep — Yahir grinding two CS classes through the summer.
  • Travel logistics: train/bus ticket for Seattle, asking "bubs and d3 about Houston", buying Ray-Bans and Nyjah skate shoes pre-trip. The Houston question never recurs in the corpus — likely a friend-visit possibility that fizzled.
  • Xfinity ACP setup: "Xfinity rewards center.com, call phone number get set up. ACP" — Yahir was setting up Affordable Connectivity Program discounted internet. Useful ground-truth: he was operating with low-cost subsidies in 2022, even as he grinded toward Coinbase pitches and OSIG leadership.
  • The Jeff meet: "Jeff will meet us at 12 — need to send him 4-digit pin that we come up with." Opaque without context — possibly a key-handoff or storage-unit access. Left as-is.
  • The fixed-fee electricity thought: "can electricity be a fixed fee? Based on historical usage." A one-line product idea — flat-rate utility billing using historical baseline. Doesn't recur in the corpus, but worth flagging as an early Yahir-product-instinct (Bromenu flavor: take a variable-cost domain and charge a knowable subscription against it).

Pattern observed

Pure — todo list with a single embedded business idea. The fixed-fee-electricity line is the only durable thought; everything else is summer logistics.

The ACP detail is worth keeping for ground truth — it sits inside the same stretch of months where Yahir was pitching Coinbase as an OSIG equity analyst. The contrast (subsidized internet + investment-club leadership) is the bridge income life pattern in real-time, before he had a name for it.

Key snippets

  • "Send David package."
  • "Can electricity be a fixed fee? Based on historical usage."
